slides.title: Control plane vs data plane
bullets: Control plane: routing policies, limits, circuit breakers
Data plane: authorize → capture → settle hot paths only
Failure isolation: blast radius capped per shard via bulkheads
Observability: RED metrics per domain service + synthetic probes
Deployment: progressive rollout with automated rollback gates
Future work: unify config schema across regions
slides.notes: Showcases title_content with several bullets — validation suggests splits if limits exceeded.
